description: fila specialises in high-quality sport footwear. floaters are the perfect foot-style choice for those braving the Indian monsoon. Pair these sturdy, comfortable and breathable pair with bermudas in a similar hue and a bright tee. Upper Textile upper with forefoot, collar and ankle straps with velcro fasteners for a snug customised Fit Forefoot and ankle straps attached with an interconnecting strap with a triangular loop Cushioned lining for comfort Appliqued logo on the straps Midsole Cushioned and grooved rubber footbed to drain water Outsole TPR outsole with waffle-patterned suction grooves for grip and stability over wet surfaces shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash
